recipient_raw: U.S. SENATOR CORY BOOKER RECEIVED THE "DISTINGUISHED CIVIL RIGHTS ADVOCATE" AWARD AT THE LAWYERS' COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHTS UNDER LAW'S ANNUAL FUNDRAISING GALA (HIGGINBOTHAM GALA)
AT OUR ANNUAL FUNDRAISING GALA, REP. HAKEEM JEFFRIES WAS HONORED. OTHER HONOREES WERE ARIAN SIMONE OF THE FEARLESS FUND, & CLIENTS RUTHIE WALLS, COLTON GILBERT, GISELLE DAVIS, SADIE BELL REYNOLDS
KRISTEN CLARKE, ASST. ATTORNEY GENERAL FOR CIVIL RIGHTS AT THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, WAS HONORED AS A LAWYERS COMMITTEE LUMINARY AS A PAST PRESIDENT & EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF THE LAWYERS COMMITTEE
REPS. ADRIANO ESPAILLAT, NANETTE BARRAGAN, TONY CARDENAS, DARREN SOTO, NORMA TORRES, AND SEN. BEN RAY LUJAN
